top_signals.title: Drewry: Red Sea Diversion Tracker
top_signals.summary: Transits via Suez highest since January. The number of containerships sailing via the Suez Canal rose to 35 in the week ended 28 June, the highest weekly number since January, according to the Drewry Red Sea Diversion Tracker. The US-Iran agreement signed after the Iran conflict could reset the clock on the return of more ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New UCL framework gives shipping lenders a forward-looking climate risk score — for the first time
top_signals.summary: When a bank or investor assesses a ship’s climate risk today, the tools available largely look backward: historic emissions, current compliance status, or a snapshot of where a vessel stands right now. None offer a public, forward-looking view of how that same ship might fare across the range of regulatory and market scenarios shipping could ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI Debt Makes Credit Market Look Safer and Masks Risk
top_signals.summary: On paper, the US corporate bond market is getting safer as more high-rated tech companies sell debt. Many investors fear that safety will prove illusory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Robinhood CEO says future of crypto is in real-world assets, not memecoins
top_signals.summary: Vlad Tenev spoke to his belief in the merging of TradFi and crypto when asked if digital assets have entered an "enduring" downturn.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Almonty kicks off processing operations at Sangdong tungsten mine in South Korea
top_signals.summary: The Sangdong mine was historically one of the world’s largest tungsten producers before operations were suspended in the early 1990s.
